reason: Verified that the browser use feature allows an agent to open a browser, navigate to a URL, retrieve the page title, and return the correct response.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — page loaded successfully showing Super Agent application with three agents in sidebar (QA-20260417-022003-lrp7, QA-20260417-022001-5ps1, QA-20260417-022000-krx8)
Clicked on agent "QA-20260417-022001-5ps1" in sidebar — agent details page opened showing chat interface, message input field, and configuration options
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." in the input field — message visible in textbox, Send button became enabled
Clicked Send message button — message was sent successfully, agent status changed from "idle" to "working"

Waited for agent response up to 10 seconds — agent completed work in 7 seconds, showing response "The page title is Example Domain." with two successful action cards: "Open Browser https://example.com" and "Browser Command $ get title"
Verified response mentions "Example Domain" — response clearly states "The page title is Example Domain." satisfying the test requirement
